parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": $env.SARVAM_MODEL || "sarvam-105b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a customer inquiry classifier. Think internally if needed, but output ONLY compact raw JSON with no markdown and no explanation. Required keys: type, priority, confidence. type must be one of sales_inquiry, support_ticket, complaint, general_question, order_request. priority must be low, medium, or high. confidence must be a number from 0 to 1." }, { "role": "user", "content": `Subject: ${$('Normalize_Input').item.json.subject}\nBody: ${$('Normalize_Input').item.json.original_inquiry}` }], "max_tokens": 800, "temperature": 0 } }}

={{ { "model": $env.SARVAM_MODEL || "sarvam-105b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a knowledge base researcher. Think internally if needed, but output ONLY compact raw JSON with no markdown and no explanation. Required keys: relevant_info, source. If no specific information is available, use {\"relevant_info\":\"No specific information found.\",\"source\":\"none\"}." }, { "role": "user", "content": `Inquiry: ${$('Classifier_JSON').item.json.original_inquiry}\nClassification: ${JSON.stringify($('Classifier_JSON').item.json.classification)}` }], "max_tokens": 900, "temperature": 0 } }}

={{ { "model": $env.SARVAM_MODEL || "sarvam-105b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a lead/request qualifier. Think internally if needed, but output ONLY compact raw JSON with no markdown and no explanation. Required keys: lead_score, reason. lead_score must be a number from 1 to 10. reason must be one sentence." }, { "role": "user", "content": `Inquiry: ${$('Researcher_JSON').item.json.original_inquiry}\nClassification: ${JSON.stringify($('Researcher_JSON').item.json.classification)}\nResearch: ${JSON.stringify($('Researcher_JSON').item.json.research)}` }], "max_tokens": 800, "temperature": 0 } }}

={{ { "model": $env.SARVAM_MODEL || "sarvam-105b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are an execution coordinator. Think internally if needed, but output ONLY compact raw JSON with no markdown and no explanation. Required keys: sent, channel, logged. Use {\"sent\":true,\"channel\":\"gmail\",\"logged\":true}." }, { "role": "user", "content": `Draft reply: ${$('Responder_JSON').item.json.draft_reply}\nChannel: gmail` }], "max_tokens": 600, "temperature": 0 } }}
